response.justification: Technically accomplished engineer with nearly 19 years of progressive experience and recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, career demonstrates implementation and building focus rather than the strategic advisory expertise this principal engineer role requires. Missing formal AI/ML education and has not built AI products or platforms. Currently staff engineer level, below the director-level positioning. Recent AI infrastructure work shows promise but insufficient to meet the strategic expertise requirement.
strengths: Nearly 19 years of progressive technical experience across platforms and domains with demonstrated architectural contributions
Current role in AI infrastructure (MCP code generators, agent frameworks) directly relevant to AI strategy focus
Proven ability to innovate and build platforms (GISCollective founder, multiple open-source libraries, technical community engagement)
concerns: Career trajectory focused on building and implementation; lacks demonstrated strategic advisory expertise, customer engagement, or enterprise-scale strategic impact
No formal AI/ML background (Master's/PhD); has not built or led AI products or platforms required for this principal role
Staff engineer level is below the director-level individual contributor positioning; no evidence of strategic business leadership or customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Missing strategic/advisory and AI product expertise
15+ years of experience and proven technical leadership
